text: Reminder: the quarterly all-hands is Thursday at 10am in the main auditorium. Lunch will be provided and the leadership Q&A starts at 11.
Can everyone update their timesheets by Friday? Finance needs them closed before the month-end reporting cycle kicks off next week.
The cafeteria menu changes next week — the new vendor is adding more vegetarian options and extending breakfast hours to 9:30.
Welcome to the team! Your laptop and badge will be ready at the IT help desk on Monday morning; your buddy will meet you in the lobby.
The wellness committee is organizing a 5k charity run next month. Sign up on the intranet page and invite your family members too.
Please review the updated travel policy: economy class for flights under six hours, and all bookings should go through the corporate portal.
Marketing draft for the careers page: join a culture of innovation where your ideas matter and your growth is our priority.
The parking garage on level 3 will be closed for maintenance this weekend; please use the overflow lot across the street.
Happy to share that our team won the internal hackathon trophy! Celebration lunch on Friday — vote for the restaurant in the poll.
Agenda for the staff meeting: project status round-robin, vacation calendar review, new hire introductions, and open floor for questions.
The IT service desk will migrate ticketing systems over the weekend. Open tickets will carry over automatically and no action is needed.
Book club picks for this quarter are posted on the social channel. We meet the last Wednesday of each month in the small conference room.
